Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Action Pending Completion Of Underinsured Motorist Arbitration
Off Calendar Apr-28-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE Motion to Stay Action Pending Completion of Underinsured Motorist Arbitration. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is granted, pursuant to CCP section 1281.4. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/AJR)Judge: A. James Robertson; Court Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR # 8620

Notice Of Motion To Consolidate Or In The Alternative Motion To Transfer Underinsured Motorist Claim To Superior Court
Off Calendar Apr-28-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF KIRK KELSEN Motion to Consolidate or in the Alternative Motion to Transfer Underinsured Motorist Claim to Superior Court. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Off Calendar, as moot in light of ruling on Defendant's motion to stay. (302/AJR) Judge: A. James Robertson; Court Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR # 8620
